arts.ttl: Everton fan’s Merseyside derby dream dashed after flying in from Australia
arts.sum: Storm Darragh forces Liverpool game to be called off Fifteen-year-old gets invite to Everton training ground A 15-year-old from Australia used all his savings to attend the final league derby at Goodison Park, only for the match to be postponed four hours before kick-off. The Everton fan from Sydney, Mackenzie Kinsella, asked his Liverpool-born mum at Easter whether he could return to England for the historic occasion. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: James Pearce shares the three issues surrounding Liverpool and Virgil van Dijk’s new contract now
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk’s Liverpool contract is up at the end of the season. The Liverpool captain could leave the club on a free transfer in...

arts.ttl: Marco Reus makes 'amazing' Anfield admission as Liverpool position revealed
arts.sum: Marco Reus was blown away by the atmosphere at Anfield and spoke about his admiration for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Everton send perfect offer to Australian supporter as Ric Wee responds to derby postponement
arts.sum: Everton have sent a special invite to a young fan who has made a 21,000-mile return trip from from Australia to see the final Premier League Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: "Strong interest" - Liverpool 'sound out' Premier League attacker over January move
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly being credited with a "strong interest" in Brighton & Hove Albion attacker Joao Pedro ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool new date could hand Arne Slot rare benefit from Storm Darragh
arts.sum: Paul Gorst reflects on a Merseyside derby day with a difference on Saturday as the final meeting at Goodison Park between Liverpool and Everton was postponed thanks to Storm Darragh

arts.ttl: Manager is now ‘between West Ham and Roma’ – Everton saviours Friedkins could lose out on manager
arts.sum: Former Juventus manager Max Allegri is now ‘between West Ham United and Roma’, which could mean bad news for Everton’s new owners the Friedkins. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that the Everton owners could be set for frustration in their search for a new long-term Roma manager. arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher offers advice to Trent Alexander-Arnold amid Liverpool exit rumours
arts.sum: Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with a move away from Anfield. The right-back has been in fine form for the Reds this season and has helped them to lead the Premier League and Champions League standings. arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold shares his thoughts on new manager Arne Slot amid stagnant Liverpool contract negotiations
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has made his feelings clear on new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, as he discussed the Dutchman's successful tenure so far.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah and Alexis Mac Allister break silence on Liverpool postponement amid Storm Darragh chaos
arts.sum: Liverpool were handed a surprise day off after the Premier League showdown vs Everton was postponed due to Storm Darragh and its impact on Merseyside.
